headline: **MLB Daily Recap: April 19, 2026**
article:
The New York Yankees dominated the Kansas City Royals 13-4, with Cody Bellinger leading the offense with a 3-hit, 2-home run performance. In other action, the Cincinnati Reds secured a 5-4 victory over the Minnesota Twins, with Kyle Nicolas earning the win in relief. The Chicago Cubs edged the New York Mets 4-2, with Jameson Taillon leading the Cubs to victory.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Jhoan Duran, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list by the Philadelphia Phillies due to a left oblique strain. Other players on the injured list include Prelander Berroa of the Chicago White Sox, Cade Horton of the Chicago Cubs, Jorge Polanco of the New York Mets, Patrick Wisdom of the Seattle Mariners, Zach McKinstry of the Detroit Tigers, Josh Hader of the Houston Astros, and Daniel Palencia of the Chicago Cubs.

The Los Angeles Dodgers have bolstered their pitching staff with the acquisition of right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott from the Baltimore Orioles. The Dodgers traded right-handed pitcher Axel Perez to the Orioles in exchange for McDermott. The New York Mets have also made a trade, sending left-handed pitcher Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash.

top_news.title: **Royals Fall to Yankees in Blowout**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees dominated the Kansas City Royals 13-4, securing a decisive victory. Cody Bellinger led the Yankees' offense with a 3-hit, 2-home run performance, driving in 5 runs.

top_news.title: **Reds Edge Twins in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds secured a 5-4 victory over the Minnesota Twins, with Kyle Nicolas earning the win in relief. Tyler Stephenson led the Reds' offense with 2 RBI, while Nicolas struck out 3 batters in a scoreless inning.

top_news.title: **Mets Fall Short in Chicago**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs edged the New York Mets 4-2, securing a crucial win. Jameson Taillon led the Cubs to victory with 6.0 innings pitched, 4 strikeouts, and 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Rays Edge Pirates in Thrilling 8-7 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays outlasted the Pittsburgh Pirates in a back-and-forth contest, ultimately securing an 8-7 win. Cedric Mullins led the Rays' offense with a strong performance, collecting 2 hits, including a home run, and driving in 3 runs.

top_news.title: **Phillies Place Jhoan Duran on 15-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Philadelphia Phillies right-handed pitcher Jhoan Duran has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a left oblique strain, effective retroactive to April 15, 2026.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Acquire RHP Chayce McDermott in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers have made a move to bolster their pitching staff, acquiring right-handed pitcher Chayce McDermott from the Baltimore Orioles. The trade, announced on April 16, 2026, brings McDermott to the Dodgers in exchange for right-handed pitcher Axel Perez.
